result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  dotnet-stack [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  report                    reports the managed stacks from a running .NET process
  ps                        Lists the dotnet processes that stack traces can be collected from.
  symbolicate <input-path>  Get the line number from the Method Token and IL Offset in a stacktrace

  ps                        Lists the dotnet processes that stack traces can be collected from.
  symbolicate <input-path>  Get the line number from the Method Token and IL Offset in a stacktrace

result.stdout:
Description:
  Lists the dotnet processes that stack traces can be collected from.

Usage:
  dotnet-stack ps [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  dotnet-stack ps [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  reports the managed stacks from a running .NET process

Usage:
  dotnet-stack report [options]

Options:
  -p, --process-id  The process id to report the stack.
  -n, --name        The name of the process to report the stack.
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  reports the managed stacks from a running .NET process

Usage:
  dotnet-stack report [options]

Options:
  -p, --process-id  The process id to report the stack.
  -n, --name        The name of the process to report the stack.
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Get the line number from the Method Token and IL Offset in a stacktrace

Usage:
  dotnet-stack symbolicate <input-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <input-path>  Path to the stacktrace text file

Options:
  -d, --search-dir  Path of multiple directories with assembly and pdb [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/xdg-config|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/nuget-packages|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/xdg-cache|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/nuget-http-cache|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/tool|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/home|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/dotnet-home|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/xdg-data|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-73f431db3f9c48f2ae9b0d2e226e3afd/xdg-runtime]
  -o, --output      Output directly to a file (Default: <input-path>.symbolicated)
  -c, --stdout      Output directly to a console
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
